notes: FAIR-MAST Level-2 (classic MAST) current_channel labels → FreeGSNKE classic circuit names. Series-wound U/L FEED pairs (P2–P5, P3) report the same circuit amp → combine=mean (sum would double). P6 is anti-series vertical control: FreeGSNKE Circuit applies I_upper=+I_c and I_lower=-I_c (lower filament polarity=-1), so I_c=antisym_mean(P6U,P6L)=0.5*(P6U-P6L). Some shots (e.g. 30203) publish no P6 current channels → P6 optional with absent_policy=zero (declared absence, not invented metrology).

P2_inner.notes: Series pair; U/L FEED ≈ same I → mean (not sum).

P2_outer.notes: Series pair; U/L FEED ≈ same I → mean (not sum).

P3.notes: Series pair when energized; U/L FEED ≈ same I → mean (not sum).

P4.notes: Series pair; U/L FEED ≈ same I → mean (not sum).

P5.notes: Series pair; U/L FEED ≈ same I → mean (not sum).

P6.notes: Anti-series vertical control. Column order upper then lower: I_c=0.5*(P6U-P6L). If FAIR-MAST omits P6U/P6L for a shot (e.g. 30203), optional+absent_policy=zero holds I_P6=0 A (declared absence).
